--- 
title: "R과 통계분석"
author: "박동련"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  bookdown::gitbook: default
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography:
- book.bib
- packages.bib
description: null
#link-citations: yes
#github-repo: rstudio/bookdown-demo
---

# 소개하기 {.unnumbered}

![](Figure/cover.jpg)
